title: satureja sachalinensis var. japonica
intro: Satureja sachalinensis var. japonica, also known as Japanese mountain savory, is a variety of the Satureja sachalinensis plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Japanese mountain savory include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
